name: Chicken Stock, Home Made
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large stockpot over high heat, bring the bones, onions, carrots, celery, thyme and water to a boil.
2. Add the bay leaf. Reduce the heat and simmer for 4 to 6 hours, or until the stock is richly flavored.
3. Strain through a fine sieve into a bowl. Use immediately or allow to cool to room temperature before refrigerating.
This stock keeps in the refrigerator for up to 1 week or can be frozen.
